headline: Capital One Financial (COF) Strengthens Digital Shopping Experience
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is one of the undervalued large cap stocks to buy. On April 1, Capital One Shopping, a subsidiary of Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF), entered a new distribution partnership with CardCash, the discounted gift card platform owned by Giftify, Inc. (NASDAQ:GIFT). The deal allows CardCash’s inventory of discounted gift cards […]
